items.title: Gaussian Error Linear Units (GELUs)
items.author: Dan Hendrycks, Kevin Gimpel
items.note: Original 2016 paper defining GELU(x) = x·Φ(x) and motivating probabilistic gating.

items.title: PyTorch nn.GELU documentation
items.author: PyTorch Contributors
items.note: Reference for exact and approximate GELU implementations in training code.

items.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers
items.author: Devlin et al.
items.note: Widely cited model that popularized GELU in Transformer FFN blocks.
